transcript:
SOURCE: Fathom (via HubSpot internal notes) — https://fathom.video/share/8-xsPXWFzr_BXUoDDaxvJk-dzCrzd2g-

AI Meeting Summary ✨

Generated by Fathom // View Recording (40 mins - No highlights)

Meeting Purpose

To explore SMB Team's fit for the firm's growth and expansion goals.

Key Takeaways

Goal: Double Canadian revenue to $2M to fund a new US firm (starting with Lemon Law, then PI) once immigration approvals are complete.

Challenge: The current marketing agency, Grow Club.Marketing, delivers inconsistent lead quality, wasting the principal attorney's time with free 30-min consultations that don't convert.

SMB Team's Pitch: Focus on quality over quantity by targeting high-value clients and using AI to automate workflows, potentially eliminating 29 of 40 case-handling steps.

Next Step: A follow-up call is set for Tuesday, July 22, at 10:30 AM PT, where SMB Team will present a tailored proposal.

Topics

Firm Context & Growth Goals

Canadian Firm: Criminal defense practice with ~6-7 staff.

2025 Revenue Goal: $2M (double 2024's $950k).

Practice Areas: Criminal defense (85-90%), family law, and immigration, often bundled from a single event (e.g., domestic violence).

Capacity: Can handle more cases, including lower-paying Legal Aid work, but needs higher-value private clients to meet revenue goals.

US Expansion: A California firm is planned, pending green card approval for the COO.

Strategy: Start with Lemon Law, then expand to Personal Injury (PI).

Current Marketing Performance & Challenges

Agency: Grow Club.Marketing.

Budget: ~$10k/month (Google & Meta).

July Performance (to date):

Spend: $4.2k

Leads: 103 (82 calls, 21 forms)

New Clients: 5–7

Primary Challenge: Inconsistent lead quality.

Impact: Wastes the principal attorney's time on free 30-min consultations with non-ideal clients.

Need: More qualified leads to maximize the attorney's time and increase revenue.

SMB Team's Proposed Solution

Focus: Quality over quantity.

Strategy: Target high-value clients using heat mapping and demographic data, rather than generating mass leads.

Content: Create fewer, higher-quality pieces optimized for organic ranking and AI search results.

Operational Efficiency: Use AI to automate workflows.

Example: Eliminated 29 of 40 case-handling steps for a probate firm.

Goal: Increase firm autonomy, reduce costs, and enable growth without needing to hire more staff.

Tech Stack: Integrate with the firm's existing GoHighLevel CRM, not replace it.

Next Steps

Jacob Meissner (SMB Team):

Consult with the paid ads director for a marketing scope.

Prepare a tailored proposal for the Canadian firm.

Send a meeting recap with relevant case studies.

Both:

Attend the follow-up meeting on Tuesday, July 22, at 10:30 AM PT.

Action Items

Consult paid ads director re: Toronto scoping; prep tailored proposal + pricing for Iman - WATCH (5 secs)
Email Iman recap + relevant case studies - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend follow-up call w/ Iman, Tue Jul 22 10:30 PT - WATCH (5 secs)
Attend follow-up call w/ Iman, Tue Jul 22 10:30 PT - WATCH (5 secs)
